channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: [DARK WEB] qilin ransomware: new victim 'Millard Manufacturing' (US)
[DARK WEB] ThreatFox: Quasar RAT — 2 new IOCs detected
[DARK WEB] ThreatFox: Vidar — 4 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with vidar .

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: ValleyRAT — 2 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with valleyrat .

item.title: CenterWell Home Health reports potential data breach
